description: Domestic business with a historical fraud allegation from ten years ago reviewed during onboarding and cleared after adverse media assessment
parsed_text:
KYC / CDD ENTITY ONBOARDING — ADVERSE MEDIA REVIEW
Legal Entity Name: Summit Ridge Construction LLC
Customer Type: Business
EIN: XX-XXX2284
State of Formation: Colorado
Principal Address: 4800 Baseline Road, Suite 200, Boulder, CO 80303, USA
Phone: (720) 555-0141   Email: admin@summitridgeconstruction.example
Business Activity: General contracting — residential and light commercial construction
NAICS Code: 236110
Source of Funds: Project milestone payments from homebuilders and private clients
Expected Monthly Activity: $380,000

OWNERSHIP
Beneficial Owner: Derek Paxton — Ownership: 75%
Beneficial Owner 2: Renata Paxton — Ownership: 25%
Control Person: Derek Paxton (CEO / Managing Member)

IDENTITY DOCUMENTS
Derek Paxton — Driver License: DL-CO-XX5513, Exp: 2028-04-30
Renata Paxton — Driver License: DL-CO-XX8820, Exp: 2027-12-15

ADVERSE MEDIA REVIEW
Screening Date: 2025-09-14
Adverse Media Alert: System flagged historical news article.
Source: Denver Post, 2015-06-18 — Headline: "Boulder Contractor Faces Fraud Complaint Over Incomplete Project."

ADVERSE MEDIA ANALYST REVIEW (Analyst: Priscilla Huang)
Article Summary: A 2015 civil complaint was filed by one homeowner alleging Derek Paxton's prior construction company (Paxton Home Builders Ltd, dissolved 2016) failed to complete a renovation project and retained deposits totaling $38,000.
Outcome: Civil dispute resolved out of court in 2015; confidential settlement. No criminal charges filed. No regulatory action. Entity (Paxton Home Builders Ltd) was voluntarily dissolved in 2016 following transition of business operations to Summit Ridge Construction LLC.
Age of Allegation: 10 years. No subsequent adverse media identified.
Repetitive Pattern Assessment: Isolated single incident at prior entity — no pattern of misconduct.
Current Regulatory Standing: Colorado Department of Regulatory Agencies (DORA) — Contractor License No. CO-GC-XXXX9901, Active, no disciplinary history since 2016.

CONCLUSION
Adverse Media Disposition: CLEARED. The historical allegation is 10 years old, involved a civil (not criminal) matter, was resolved, and no subsequent misconduct has been identified. The prior entity was dissolved and current entity has a clean regulatory record.
Approver: Nathan Cleeves, Compliance Manager
Approval Date: 2025-09-17

SCREENING RESULTS
OFAC / SDN: Clear.
PEP Status: No — neither beneficial owner nor control person is a PEP.
Final Adverse Media Status: Cleared.

RISK ASSESSMENT
PEP Status: No
Risk Rating: Medium
CDD Level: Standard
Compliance Notes: Adverse media disposition memo on file. Annual monitoring set for early review given historical incident.
Review Date: 2025-09-17   Reviewer: Priscilla Huang

expected_json.source_of_funds: Project milestone payments from homebuilders and private clients
